scripts.install:all: npm install --workspaces --include-workspace-root && cd agent && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,agent,frontend -c blue,magenta,cyan "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd agent && uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
